_comment: Security headers: a strict nonce-based CSP is impractical because Astro hoists small inline scripts, JSON-LD blocks, and the language-detection script in BaseLayout all rely on inline code. The baseline CSP below keeps 'unsafe-inline' for script-src and style-src — the trade-off is documented in README.md under 'Security headers'. HSTS + Permissions-Policy + frame-ancestors 'none' still cover the remaining hardening surface.

headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), interest-cohort=(), browsing-topics=(), payment=(), usb=()

default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
